basic_details.job_title: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Coal India S&T Junior Research Fellow
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) has officially announced the Coal India S&T Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. Candidates who are up to 28 years of age and hold a GATE/ NET qualification along with an M.Tech in Water Resources Engineering, Hydraulic Engineering, Hydrology, Environmental Engineering, Geoinformatics, Remote Sensing & GIS, Civil Engineering, Earth Sciences or equivalent, or an M.Sc. in Environmental Science, Atmospheric Science, Geology, Applied Geology or equivalent, can submit their online applications on or before 25 J

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidate as per GoI rule.

qualification.education_qualification: GATE/ NET qualified, M.Tech in Water Resources Engineering/ Hydraulic Engineering/Hydrology/ Environment Engineering/Geoinformatics/Remote Sensing & GIS/ Civil Engineering/ Earth Sciences or equivalent, M.Sc in Environmental Science/ Atmospheric Science/ Geology/ Applied Geology or equivalent
qualification.details: GATE/ NET qualified with M.Tech in Water Resources Engineering/ Hydraulic Engineering/ Hydrology/ Environment Engineering/ Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing & GIS/ Civil Engineering/ Earth Sciences or M.Sc in Environmental Science/ Atmospheric Science/ Geology/ Applied Geology or equivalent.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37000/- p.m. + HRA for first two years Rs. 42000/- p.m. + HRA for third year

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT (ISM) Dhanbad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Coal India S&T Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Coal India S&T Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT (ISM) Dhanbad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Coal India S&T Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Coal India S&T Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Coal India S&T Junior Research Fellow positions at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is 25th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Coal India S&T Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Coal India S&T Junior Research Fellow position at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be GATE/NET qualified and possess an M.Tech degree in relevant engineering fields or an M.Sc degree in specified science disciplines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Coal India S&T Junior Research Fellow post is 28 years, with age relaxation applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/- plus HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Coal India S&T Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Coal India S&T Junior Research Fellow at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad is located in Dhanbad, Jharkhand.
